calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Judge Pro Tem: David Dawson, CSR: Brenda Fields, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Arnold W. Evje, Esq., for Plaintiff City Housing, Inc.
Defendant Robert Newman present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Stipulation for judgment filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
